---
title: "Alethea Bigg"
---

## Alethea Bigg

**Dates:** (1777-1847)

### Description

friend of Jane Austen, aunt of Sir William Heathcote

### Biography

She was a member of the Bigg Wither family;  other members are listed under Wither.

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 21st 1844[[footnote:1]]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
